nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 东洋界
nodes.summary: The Indomalayan realm is one of the eight biogeographic realms.

nodes.name: 爪哇岛
nodes.summary: 爪哇岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联60种鸟类，包括绿孔雀、Moustached hawk-cuckoo、八声杜鹃等60种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Pygmy bushtit
nodes.summary: Pygmy bushtit（Pygmy bushtit，学名 Aegithalos exilis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于东洋界、爪哇岛，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The pygmy bushtit is the only Indomalayan member of the Aegithalidae family. It is only found on the island of Java in Indonesia where it inhabits montane forests and plantations above 1,000 metres (3,300 ft), but can occasionally be seen as low as 830 metres (2,720 ft). They live on the edge of coniferous and open tree forests in the mountains of central and western Java

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The pygmy bushtit is the only Indomalayan member of the Aegithalidae family. It is only found on the island of Java in Indonesia where it inhabits montane forests and plantations above 1,000 metres (3,300 ft), but can occasionally be seen as low as 830 metres (2,720 ft). links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: This drab-coloured bird is endemic to Indonesia, where it is only found in montane forests on the island of Java

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The pygmy tits current threats are unknown, however the densely populated island of Java could faces issues as the mountain forests could be threatened by deforestation over time
